content: Refactor Marketplace.jsx Browse tab to use useCachedList with browseStore
Refactor Marketplace.jsx MyListings sub-component to use myListingsStore (with mutation hooks for delete + sync)
Refactor ExpertsDirectory.jsx to use useCachedList with expertsStore (preserving draft/applied filter pattern)
Run frontend lint + esbuild to verify no compile errors
Take screenshots / run frontend testing agent to verify Marketplace & Experts pages render correctly with cached lists and instant nav
